meaning: adj.(乐曲等)适于发挥高度技巧的
examples: W. A. Mozart: Sinfonia Concertante for Violin, Viola and Orchestra in E flat, K. 364
Musically, this was a period of outstanding creativity which saw the production of many of his best known symphonic, concertante and operatic works, and his final, incomplete Requiem.
Yuri Bashmet and Uto Ugi performed Mozart's Sinfonia Concertante for violin, viola and orchestra.
